provenance.source_corpus: Increasing density of juvenile Atlantic (Gadus morhua) and Greenland cod (G. ogac) in association with spatial expansion and recovery of eelgrass (Zostera marina) in a coastal nursery habitat

source_spans.text: Eelgrass cover had noticeably increased in the 1999–2000 ‘removal–recovery’ sites and at the ‘expansion’ sites following 2000.
Increasing density of juvenile Atlantic ( Gadus morhua ) and Greenland cod (G. ogac) in association with spatial expansion and recovery of eelgrass ( Zostera marina )i na coastal nursery habitat
The study included two “recovery” sites from which an area of ~ 500 m2 eelgrass was completely removed in 1999 and 2000
As expected, we observed a substantive decline in fish density at these two sites – CC and MS – in 2001

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:ed7da5ac3b0d
edges.original_sentence: Using randomized intervention analysis (RIA) we detected positive relationships between eelgrass cover and relative fish density during 2001 –2006.

source_spans.text: Using randomized intervention analysis (RIA) we detected positive relationships between eelgrass cover and relative fish density during 2001 –2006.

source_document.title: Increasing density of juvenile Atlantic (Gadus morhua) and Greenland cod (G. ogac) in association with spatial expansion and recovery of eelgrass (Zostera marina) in a coastal nursery habitat
source_document.journal: Journal of Experimental Marine Biology and Ecology

edges.original_sentence: As expected, we observed a substantive decline in fish density at these two sites – CC and MS – in 2001 (the following year) consistent with the pre-manipulation condition
